nasb.text: Do not fear, beasts of the field, For the pastures of the wilderness have turned green, For the tree has borne its fruit, The fig tree and the vine have yielded in full.

esv.text: Fear not, you beasts of the field, for the pastures of the wilderness are green; the tree bears its fruit; the fig tree and vine give their full yield.

cnv.text: 田野的走獸啊，你們不要懼怕， 因為曠野的草場又發青了， 樹木又結果子了， 無花果樹和葡萄樹也都效力了。

ccb.text: 田野的走兽啊，不要惧怕， 因为绿草铺遍了原野， 树木也结满了果子， 无花果树和葡萄树都结实累累。
